task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bahmni home screen or main dashboard is visible, indicating successful authentication (expected credentials: superman/Admin123).

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the patient registration section
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Create Patient', 'Registration', or similar new patient entry form is open in the Bahmni interface.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the patient's first and last name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name fields in the registration form contain 'Kwame' (First Name) and 'Mensah' (Last Name).
The gender selection (dropdown, radio button, or toggle) is set to 'Male'.
The age field contains '34', or a birthdate corresponding to 34 years old is entered.

task_completion.description: Agent saved the new patient record
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification, a newly generated patient ID, or the specific patient dashboard for 'Kwame Mensah' is visible, confirming the record was saved.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Bahmni web interface rather than using terminal commands or APIs
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Bahmni graphical user interface is visible in the screenshots. There should be no evidence of curl commands, direct database inserts, or API scripts in a terminal.

integrity.description: Agent entered data into the actual application forms
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient details are typed into the specific input fields of the Bahmni web application, not written in a text editor, notepad, or unrelated application.

integrity.description: Agent completed the process rather than just filling out the form and stopping
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show a system response to saving (like a loading spinner, success message, or patient profile view), proving the agent didn't just type the details and halt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires registering a patient in the Bahmni (OpenMRS) hospital management system via its web UI. The target details are: First Name: 'Kwame', Last Name: 'Mensah', Gender: 'Male', Age: '34'. The agent must log in using the credentials 'superman' / 'Admin123'. Verify that these exact details are entered into the Bahmni web interface and that the record is successfully saved.
